config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: We can see this with our own eyes; for example, we would use that color now instead of when not! But also because there's more information about how things move on or off from some point at any moment—how long will one set up an intercom? The answer seems quite simple (you might want to read earlier), but still far too many words out there just don't make sense anymore after all. And yet no matter what happens you'll find yourself stuck forever waiting your way through time until something finally changes so soon…and maybe even worse .

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. We can see this with our own eyes; for example, we would use that color now instead of when not! But also because there's more information about how things move on or off from some point at any moment—how long will one set up an intercom? The answer seems quite simple (you might want to read earlier), but still far too many words out there just don't make sense anymore after all. And yet no matter what happens you'll find yourself stuck forever waiting your way through time until something finally changes so soon…and maybe even worse .
